name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-da-socratic-tutor
title: Socratic Tutor Declarative Agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot
shortDescription: A teaching agent that uses Socratic questioning to guide learning.
longDescription: Socratic Tutor is a declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot that uses the Socratic method of teaching through guided questioning rather than direct answers. It helps learners build critical-thinking and reasoning skills - ideal for learning programming concepts, understanding complex topics, preparing for interviews, and exploring professional and academic subjects. This sample was converted from the socratic-tutor agent instruction in the pnp/copilot-prompts repository.
